visual_description: A dark-colored sedan with its headlights on drives slowly down a narrow, wet street at night. In the background, a large, ornate temple with golden spires is illuminated against the dark sky. Two figures run across the street in front of the car, one on the left and one on the right, as the car continues to move forward.
audio_description: A low, ominous musical score plays, creating a suspenseful atmosphere. The sound of the car's engine and tires on the wet pavement is audible.
